title: Time-independent perturbation theory: degeneracy lifted to the second order
author: Álvarez, Juan
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Although the fundamental principles of time-independent perturbation theory are well-established and widely applied, the specific treatment of degeneracy lifted to the second order remains largely unexplored. This work fills the gap by presenting a systematic derivation of time-independent perturbation theory that accounts for the added complexity introduced by non-trivial degeneracies. We provide a general procedure and corresponding formulae for calculating state and energy corrections to any order, with degeneracy lifted to the second order. To demonstrate the efficacy of the procedure, we apply these formulae to solve two toy model problems and a prototype problem of the dressed quark system.

To demonstrate the efficacy of the procedure, we apply these formulae to solve two toy model problems and a prototype problem of the dressed quark system.
